titleStmt.title: SII 17.713: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 713. (A.R. No. 656 of 1904.) RĀMAGIRI, TIRUVALLUR TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the east wall of the Bhairava shrine in the Vālīśvara temple.
The details of date viz., Mithuna 32, śu. 1, Monday, Pūśam regularly corresponds to 1245 A.D., June 26, Monday, ·70; f.d.n. ·05.

This inscription records the gift of 16 māḍai by Vaḍugappiḷḷai alias Vayirādarāyaṉ of Koṭṭaḷattūr, for burning a perpetual lamp in the temple of Tirukkārikarai-piḷḷaiyār. The gift was entrusted to the Śivabrāhmaṇas of the temple who under took to maintain the lamp. (See No. 712 above.)

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvanaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīirājarāja
tevaṟku yāṇṭu [2 10 9]vatu mitunaṉāyaṟṟu muppattiraṇṭā
ntiyatiyāṉa tiṅkaṭkiḻamaiyum pūrvvapakṣat
tu pratamaiyum pūcamum Āṉa Aṉṟu jayaṅkoṇ
ṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu kuṉṟavattaṉa koṭṭattu
niṉṟaiyūr nāṭṭu
kārikaraip piḷḷaiyāṟku koṭṭaḷatnūr koṭṭaḷattūr kiḻavaṉ vaṭukappiḷḷaiyāṉa vayi rātarāyaneṉ Innāyaṉāṟku viṭṭa tirunantāviḷakku Oṉṟukkum I
ṭṭa māṭai patiṉāṟu Immāṭai patiṉāṟum Ik koyiṟ kāṇi Uṭaiya civappirāmaṇar kāśipa bhāradvājakottirattu Aṉpanāyakapaṭṭaṉ tevappiḷḷaiyum kāśipago
ttirattu nāṟpatteṇṇāyira paṭṭaṉ Ammai Appaṉum pūcāli paṭṭaṉ koṇṭaṉum gamutavu gottirattu tiruvāṇṭaiyum bhāradvāja gottirattu kārippiḷḷaiyum kavuśika gottirattu tirumulanum kavucikago
ttirattu taḻuvakkuḻaintāṉ paṭṭaṉum koṇṭap piḷḷaiyum Ivvaṉaivom Im māṭai patiṉāṟum kaikkoṇṭu Upaiyamāka caṉtirātittavarai Erikka kaṭavom Ivva ṉaivom . śrīmāhecurarakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 17.713 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
